title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny uses Claude Code's Skills feature for automation. The video covers three strategies for extending skill capability: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling, plus identifies two underutilized powerful features within Claude Code.
